settings.hero_heading: Trophy Shop in Bangalore — Custom Trophies & Medals | Meru Trophy
settings.hero_subheading: Bangalore's trusted trophy and award manufacturer since two decades. Same-day pickup in Bengaluru, free delivery within city on orders above Rs 2,000, and laser-engraved customisation done in-house at our Gandhinagar workshop.
settings.local_seo_paragraph:
Buying Trophies in Bangalore — What You Need to Know

Meru Trophy is headquartered at #273/2, SC Road, 2nd Cross, Gandhinagar, Bangalore 560 009, a five-minute walk from the Annamma Temple and a short auto ride from Majestic and the City Railway Station. Being a Bengaluru-based manufacturer rather than a reseller means every crystal trophy, acrylic award, metal sports cup, wooden memento and medal is produced, engraved and quality-checked in our own facility. Walk-in customers can pick designs, approve laser-engraving proofs and collect orders the same day — something importers and online-only sellers simply cannot match.

Why Bangalore customers choose Meru Trophy

  • Same-day pickup from Gandhinagar for stock trophies and medals
  • Free delivery across Bengaluru on orders above Rs 2,000
  • In-house 2D and 3D laser engraving, UV printing and logo die-casting
  • Low MOQs — 10 pieces from stock, 100 pieces for fully custom designs
  • Transparent pricing — medals from Rs 150, crystal trophies Rs 500 to Rs 5,000+

Areas we deliver across Bengaluru

We serve every major neighbourhood including Whitefield, Koramangala, Indiranagar, Electronic City, HSR Layout, BTM Layout, Marathahalli, Hebbal, JP Nagar, Jayanagar, MG Road, Sarjapur Road and Bellandur, plus the outer corridors of Yelahanka, Banashankari and Rajajinagar. Bulk corporate orders for the IT corridor are dispatched within 24-48 hours of artwork approval.

Popular among Bangalore's biggest industries

Meru Trophy is a preferred supplier to IT corporates — Infosys, Wipro, IBM, Accenture and Microsoft India offices regularly order crystal trophies for retirement and long-service awards. We supply hackathon prizes to early-stage startups in Koramangala and HSR, sports trophies to Indian Cricket School and Karnataka State sporting bodies, and engraved mementos to premier institutions like IISc, IIM Bangalore, RV College of Engineering, Christ University and BMS College of Engineering. Defence and research clients with ties to DRDO, HAL and ISRO order specialised die-cast metal awards from us each year.

Common occasions in Bangalore

  • Annual day awards and long-service recognition at MNC campuses
  • Hackathon, ideathon and demo-day prizes for startups
  • School and college sports day medals and trophies
  • Convocation and academic excellence awards
  • Religious functions and temple felicitations
  • Cricket and corporate tournament cups

Message us on WhatsApp at +91 78922 07252 or call +91 94801 50888 for a quote, design samples and same-day pickup from our Gandhinagar showroom.
